name: io.github.reutavidan/zetesis
description: Scientific due diligence on a claim. Evaluate how rigorously a scientific, biomedical, clinical, or AI claim was derived, and how well public literature, clinical trials, and filings support it, with a signed, independently re-checkable attestation. Free screen; gated full dossier.

environmentVariables.name: ZETESIS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Zetesis access token. Only needed for a full attested dossier; the free screen needs none. Request access at https://api.zetesis.science/request-access.
